mapper.insert: insert into post_tbl ( member_id, title, content, visibility, emotion_id, created_at, deleted_yn ) values ( #{memberId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{visibility}, #{emotionId}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), 'N' )
mapper.select: select hashtag_id from hashtag where hashtag = #{hashtag} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into post_mention_tbl ( post_id, mentioned_user_id, mention_text, start_index, end_index, created_at ) values ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{mentionText}, #{startIndex}, #{endIndex}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') )
mapper.select: select p.post_id as postId, p.member_id as memberId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name) as author, p.title as title, p.content as content, p.emotion_id as emotionId, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt, coalesce(m.profile_image_url, '') as profileImageUrl, coalesce(( select group_concat(concat('#', h.hashtag) order by h.hashtag separator ' ') from post_hashtag ph join hashtag h on ph.hashtag_id = h.hashtag_id where ph.post_id = p.post_id ), '') as tags, coalesce((select count(*) from user_post_like where post_id = p.post_id), 0) as likes, coalesce((select count(*) from comment_tbl where post_id = p.post_id and deleted_yn = 'N'), 0) as comments, coalesce((select count(*) from saved_post where post_id = p.post_id), 0) as saves, exists(select 1 from user_post_like where post_id = p.post_id and member_id = #{viewerId}) as likedByMe, exists(select 1 from saved_post where post_id = p.post_id and member_id = #{viewerId}) as savedByMe from post_tbl p join members m on p.member_id = m.member_id where p.post_id = #{postId} and p.deleted_yn = 'N' limit 1
mapper.update: update post_tbl set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, emotion_id = #{emotionId}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update post_tbl set deleted_yn = 'Y', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: select p.post_id as postId, p.member_id as memberId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name) as author, p.title as title, p.content as content, p.emotion_id as emotionId, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt, coalesce(m.profile_image_url, '') as profileImageUrl, coalesce(( select group_concat(concat('#', h.hashtag) order by h.hashtag separator ' ') from post_hashtag ph join hashtag h on ph.hashtag_id = h.hashtag_id where ph.post_id = p.post_id ), '') as tags, coalesce((select count(*) from user_post_like where post_id = p.post_id), 0) as likes, coalesce((select count(*) from comment_tbl where post_id = p.post_id and deleted_yn = 'N'), 0) as comments, exists(select 1 from user_post_like where post_id = p.post_id and member_id = #{viewerId}) as likedByMe, exists(select 1 from saved_post where post_id = p.post_id and member_id = #{viewerId}) as savedByMe from post_tbl p join members m on p.member_id = m.member_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' order by p.created_at desc limit 50

select p.post_id as postId, p.member_id as memberId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name) as author, p.title as title, p.content as content, p.emotion_id as emotionId, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt, coalesce(m.profile_image_url, '') as profileImageUrl, coalesce(( select group_concat(concat('#', h.hashtag) order by h.hashtag separator ' ') from post_hashtag ph join hashtag h on ph.hashtag_id = h.hashtag_id where ph.post_id = p.post_id ), '') as tags, coalesce((select count(*) from user_post_like where post_id = p.post_id), 0) as likes, coalesce((select count(*) from comment_tbl where post_id = p.post_id and deleted_yn = 'N'), 0) as comments, exists(select 1 from user_post_like where post_id = p.post_id and member_id = #{viewerId}) as likedByMe, exists(select 1 from saved_post where post_id = p.post_id and member_id = #{viewerId}) as savedByMe from post_tbl p join members m on p.member_id = m.member_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' order by (coalesce((select count(*) from user_post_like where post_id = p.post_id), 0) + coalesce((select count(*) from comment_tbl where post_id = p.post_id and deleted_yn = 'N'), 0)) desc, p.created_at desc limit #{limit}

select p.post_id as postId, p.member_id as memberId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name) as author, p.title as title, p.content as content, p.emotion_id as emotionId, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt, coalesce(m.profile_image_url, '') as profileImageUrl, coalesce(( select group_concat(concat('#', h.hashtag) order by h.hashtag separator ' ') from post_hashtag ph join hashtag h on ph.hashtag_id = h.hashtag_id where ph.post_id = p.post_id ), '') as tags, coalesce((select count(*) from user_post_like where post_id = p.post_id), 0) as likes, coalesce((select count(*) from comment_tbl where post_id = p.post_id and deleted_yn = 'N'), 0) as comments, exists(select 1 from user_post_like where post_id = p.post_id and member_id = #{viewerId}) as likedByMe, exists(select 1 from saved_post where post_id = p.post_id and member_id = #{viewerId}) as savedByMe from post_tbl p join members m on p.member_id = m.member_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.member_id = #{memberId} order by p.created_at desc limit 50

select pm.post_mention_id as postMentionId, pm.post_id as postId, pm.mentioned_user_id as userId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name) as nickname, pm.mention_text as mentionText, pm.start_index as startIndex, pm.end_index as endIndex, date_format(pm.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt from post_mention_tbl pm join members m on pm.mentioned_user_id = m.member_id where pm.post_id = #{postId} order by pm.start_index asc, pm.post_mention_id asc

select c.comment_id as commentId, c.post_id as postId, c.member_id as memberId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name) as author, c.content as content, date_format(c.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt, coalesce(m.profile_image_url, '') as profileImageUrl, c.parent_id as parentCommentId from comment_tbl c join members m on c.member_id = m.member_id where c.post_id = #{postId} and c.deleted_yn = 'N' and c.parent_id is null order by c.created_at asc

select c.comment_id as commentId, c.post_id as postId, c.member_id as memberId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name) as author, c.content as content, date_format(c.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt, coalesce(m.profile_image_url, '') as profileImageUrl, c.parent_id as parentCommentId from comment_tbl c join members m on c.member_id = m.member_id where c.post_id = #{postId} and c.deleted_yn = 'N' and c.parent_id is not null order by c.parent_id asc, c.created_at asc
select p.emotion_id as emotionId, count(*) as count from post_tbl p where p.member_id = #{memberId} and p.deleted_yn = 'N' group by p.emotion_id order by p.emotion_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into comment_tbl ( post_id, member_id, content, parent_id, created_at, deleted_yn ) values ( #{postId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, #{parentCommentId}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), 'N' )
mapper.select: select c.comment_id as commentId, c.post_id as postId, c.member_id as memberId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name) as author, c.content as content, date_format(c.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt, coalesce(m.profile_image_url, '') as profileImageUrl, c.parent_id as parentCommentId from comment_tbl c join members m on c.member_id = m.member_id where c.comment_id = #{commentId} and c.deleted_yn = 'N' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user_post_like ( post_id, member_id, created_at ) values ( #{postId}, #{memberId}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') )
insert into saved_post ( post_id, member_id, created_at ) values ( #{postId}, #{memberId}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') )
mapper.select: select p.post_id as postId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name) as author, coalesce(m.profile_image_url, '') as profileImageUrl, p.title as title, p.content as content, p.emotion_id as emotionId, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt, coalesce(( select group_concat(concat('#', h.hashtag) order by h.hashtag separator ' ') from post_hashtag ph join hashtag h on ph.hashtag_id = h.hashtag_id where ph.post_id = p.post_id ), '') as tags, coalesce((select count(*) from user_post_like where post_id = p.post_id), 0) as likes, coalesce((select count(*) from comment_tbl where post_id = p.post_id and deleted_yn = 'N'), 0) as comments, exists(select 1 from user_post_like where post_id = p.post_id and member_id = #{viewerId}) as likedByMe, exists(select 1 from saved_post where post_id = p.post_id and member_id = #{viewerId}) as savedByMe from saved_post s join post_tbl p on s.post_id = p.post_id join members m on p.member_id = m.member_id where s.member_id = #{memberId} and p.deleted_yn = 'N' order by s.created_at desc limit 50
